site.title: I-International Accessibility Task Force (I-Task Force Yekufinyeleleka Kwemave Emhlaba)
site.tagline: Kusuka ekudzingeni kufinyeleleka kuya ku-repo yasemphakatsini
nav.label: Tintfo letisisekelo
meta.home.description: I-IATF igucula tidzingo tangempela tekutfolakala kwemitfombolusito ibe ngumtfombo wemitfombo levulekile.
meta.projects.description: Tfola emaphrojekthi ekufinyeleleka kwemphakatsi lashicilelwe nge-IATF.
meta.propose.description: Cela i-accessibility project ku-IATF ngekusebentisa i-web, i-imeyili nobe i-Discord.
meta.governance.description: Fundza ngekutsi i-IATF iwemukela njani imiklamo, iphatsa njani imitfombolusito, futsi igcina njani umsebenti usemphakatsini.
meta.join.description: Tindlela tekuhlanganyela ku-IATF: kufaka sandla ngekuhlela, kuhumusha, kuhlola, nobe kulondvolota iphrojekthi.
meta.accessibility.description: Indlela i-IATF lehlose ngayo kugcina lelikhasi langcondvomshini lifinyeleleka kanye nendlela yekubika tintfo letivimbela kufinyeleleka.
meta.transparency.description: Emarekhodi lasemtsetfweni e-IATF: tincumo, imiklamo, netingucuko tihlala tivulekile.
registry.empty.title: Kute umsebenti loshicilelwe
registry.empty.body: I-IATF ilungiselela luhlelo lwayo lwekucala lwemiklamo yemphakatsi.
proposal.form.title: Tfumela sicelo
proposal.form.body: Gcwalisa lelifomu lelilandzelako kute utfumele sicelo ku-IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: I-JavaScript iyadzingeka kusebentisa lelifomu le-web. Uma ingatfolakali, sebentisa i-imeyili nobe i-Discord esikhundleni saloko.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Kutfumela lokucondzile akukabekwa kulendzawo. Lelifomu litawuvula liklayenti lakho le-imeyili esikhundleni saloko.
proposal.form.ready: Uma utfumela sicelo, i-IATF itawenta lirekhodi lekufaka sicelo.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Uyacelwa kutsi ugcwalise luhlolo lwekuvikela i-spam ngaphambi kwekutfumela.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Kuvikeleka ku-spam sekuphelelwe sikhatsi. Sicela uphindze wente luhlolo ngaphambi kwekutfumela.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Kuvikeleka kwe-spam akukakhoni kucinisekiswa kwanyalo. Sicela uphindze wetame.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Sikhatsi sekuvikela i-spam siphelile. Sicela uphindze wetame.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Uyacelwa kutsi ugcwalise letindzawo letidzingekile ngaphambi kwekutfumela.
proposal.form.success: Siyabonga, sicelo sakho sesemukelwe futsi sigcinelwe kuhlolwa.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Uma uphindze utsintsana ne-IATF mayelana nalesicelo, faka lelifomu lelingentasi.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Kukhona lokungahambi kahle ngesikhatsi utfumela sicelo. Sicela uphindze wetame. Uma lenkinga ichubeka, sebentisa i-imeyili esikhundleni saloko.
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Umtfombo welulwimi lwesiNgisi lolumelula, tingucuko tingangetwa muva
footer.label: Sicephu selikhasi
footer.blurb: Umsebenti wekufinyeleleka kumele kube lula kuwucala, kube lula kuwushicilela, futsi kube lula kutigcina kuvulekile.
footer.source: Kucondziswa kwemigomo yekufinyeleleka: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Umkhuba lowatiswa basebentisi betheknoloji yekusita.
contact.label: Kucocisana
translation.label: Simo sekuhunyushwa
translation.machineAssisted: Lokuhumusha kwentiwe ngemshini futsi kusengakahlolwa ngalokuphelele ngumuntfu lokwati kukhuluma ngalokushelelako.Tiphakamiso tiyamukelwa nge GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Lelihumusho laphindze labuketwa ngembi kwekuvuselelwa kwemitfombo yesiNgisi futsi lingadzinga kubuyeketwa.
